description: Perform a classical test theory item analysis on a 25-question AP Statistics practice exam using the workbook 'ap_stats_item_analysis.xlsx'. Complete the 'Scoring_Matrix' sheet by scoring student responses and calculating total scores. On the 'Item_Analysis' sheet, calculate item difficulty (p), upper/lower 27% group statistics, discrimination (D), and item classification ('Keep'/'Revise'). Populate the 'Test_Summary' sheet with test-level statistics, including KR-20 reliability. Use formulas for all calculations and save the completed workbook.
